home.hero_heading: Protect Yourself From Phishing & Malicious Links
home.hero_description: AntiPhish helps you detect dangerous links, understand phishing threats, and browse the internet safely — all in one powerful platform.
home.feature1_desc: Analyze URLs using intelligent detection models to identify phishing and malicious behavior.
home.feature2_desc: Understand how phishing works through real-world examples and awareness education.
home.feature3_desc: Get alerted before visiting dangerous websites and protect your credentials.
home.platform_desc: From scanning suspicious links to educating users about modern phishing techniques, AntiPhish provides end-to-end online safety.
home.cta_desc: Don't wait until you become a victim. Scan links, learn threats, and protect your digital life now.
home.footer: AntiPhish — Built for a safer internet

about.heading: About AntiPhish
about.intro: AntiPhish is a cybersecurity-focused platform designed to help users detect, understand, and prevent phishing attacks and malicious web threats in real time.
about.who_p1: Vill Design is a technology-driven initiative focused on building practical, user-friendly security tools. We observed that phishing attacks are no longer limited to poorly written emails or obvious scams — modern phishing campaigns are highly targeted, visually convincing, and often bypass user awareness.
about.who_p2: AntiPhish was created to bridge the gap between advanced security research and everyday internet usage. Our goal is to make strong protection accessible without requiring users to have deep cybersecurity knowledge.
about.problem_p1: Phishing remains one of the most effective attack vectors for cybercriminals. Users are tricked into clicking malicious links, sharing credentials, or authorizing fraudulent transactions. Many existing solutions are either too technical, reactive, or focused only on enterprise environments.
about.problem_p2: Individuals, students, and small organizations often lack tools that provide clear risk indicators, educational context, and preventive guidance in one place.
about.what_1: Scans URLs to identify phishing, suspicious, or malicious behavior.
about.what_2: Classifies links based on risk levels to help users make informed decisions.
about.what_3: Provides awareness content explaining common phishing techniques.
about.what_4: Warns users before they visit potentially harmful websites.
about.what_5: Encourages safer browsing habits through education and prevention.
about.philosophy_p1: AntiPhish is built with a privacy-first mindset. We avoid unnecessary data collection and focus on transparency in how results are presented. Security should be understandable, not intimidating.
about.philosophy_p2: Every interface decision is made to reduce user confusion, minimize false confidence, and clearly communicate risk. We believe security tools should assist decision-making, not replace it blindly.
about.ahead_p1: AntiPhish is continuously evolving. Future improvements include deeper threat classification, browser-level protections, improved detection accuracy, and expanded educational resources.
about.ahead_p2: Our long-term objective is to create a security ecosystem where awareness, prevention, and detection work together seamlessly.
about.cta_desc: Whether you are scanning a single link or learning about phishing, AntiPhish is designed to support safer online behavior.

awareness.heading: Stay Safe from Phishing Scams
awareness.intro: Phishing is a cybercrime where attackers impersonate trusted entities to steal sensitive data like passwords or card details.
awareness.trivia: Did you know? Thousands of users fall victim to phishing every month.
awareness.warning_banner: ⚠️ The website you tried to visit may be unsafe.
awareness.type1_desc: Attackers call pretending to be banks or authorities to steal sensitive information.
awareness.type1_prevention: Verify callers independently. Never share OTPs.
awareness.type2_desc: Fraudulent SMS messages with malicious links.
awareness.type3_desc: Malicious QR codes redirect to fake sites.
awareness.type3_prevention: Scan QR codes only from trusted sources.
awareness.type4_desc: Scammers impersonate brands or people you trust.
awareness.trick1: Phishing sites often look identical to real ones.
awareness.quiz_desc: Take a quiz to learn how well you identify phishing.
